text:
- [escalation] Andy: Rich Lang forwarded a blog article about manufacturing that reminded him of Mister Lang's views.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub notification that Jeeves Daily Pipeline workflow failed.
- [escalation] lang.mc@gmail.com: Jeeves pipeline alert for permanent failure with 429 rate limit error in Daily Pipeline.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub notification that Jeeves Weekly Audit Health Report workflow completely failed.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub notification that Jeeves Daily Pipeline workflow failed.
- [escalation] lang.mc@gmail.com: Jeeves pipeline alert for permanent failure with 429 rate limit error in Daily Pipeline.
- [escalation] lang.mc@gmail.com: Daily correspondence summary highlighting a Google security alert that an account is no longer recoverable.
- [escalation] Google: Google security alert that a Google Account (thaolang2@gmail.com) is no longer recoverable; langmc@gmail.com is the recovery email.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub notification that the Jeeves Daily Pipeline workflow run failed.
- [escalation] lang.mc@gmail.com: Jeeves pipeline alert indicating a permanent failure due to a 429 rate limit error with no auto-retry.
